title: A Disappearance into Thin Air

scenes.text: A tourist vanished from a bustling area without anyone noticing.
It happened in a popular tourist area in Colombia in 2018.
The disappearance of a tourist sparked a massive search effort, but no clues were found.
Even with local and international attention, the case remains unsolved.
scenes.label: REMAINS UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Colombia - 2018. A tourist vanished from a busy area, capturing local and international attention. Despite extensive searches, the case remains unsolved. Follow for daily cold cases!
